de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class AbstractWriter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.AbstractWriter
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExecutionNodeWriter, SymbolicLayoutWriter

    public abstract class AbstractWriter
extends java.lang.Object
    Provides the basic functionality for classes like ExecutionNodeWriter and SymbolicLayoutWriter which encodes an object structure as XML.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static java.lang.String ATTRIBUTE_ENCODING
      Attribute name to store encodings.
      static java.lang.String ATTRIBUTE_XML_ID
      Attribute name to store the XML ID.
      static java.lang.String DEFAULT_ENCODING
      The default enconding.
      static java.lang.String LEADING_WHITE_SPACE_PER_LEVEL
      The used leading white space in each level.
      static java.lang.String NEW_LINE
      New line.

      Appends a start tag to the given StringBuffer.

      Adds leading white space to the StringBuffer.
      protected void appendXmlHeader(java.lang.String encoding, java.lang.StringBuffer sb)

      • appendEmptyTag

        protected void appendEmptyTag(int level,
                              java.lang.String tagName,
                              java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> attributeValues,
                              java.lang.StringBuffer sb)
        Appends an empty tag to the given StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        level - The level.
        tagName - The tag name.
        attributeValues - The attributes.
        sb - The StringBuffer to append to.

      • appendStartTag

        protected void appendStartTag(int level,
                              java.lang.String tagName,

        Parameters:

        tagName - The tag name.

      • appendWhiteSpace

        protected void appendWhiteSpace(int level,
                                java.lang.StringBuffer sb)
        Adds leading white space to the StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        level - The level in the tree used for leading white space (formating).
        sb - The StringBuffer to write to.

      • appendAttribute

        protected void appendAttribute(java.lang.String attributeName,
                               java.lang.String value,
                               java.lang.StringBuffer sb)
        Adds an XML attribute to the given StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        attributeName - The attribute name.
        value - The attribute value.
        sb - The StringBuffer to write to.

      • appendXmlHeader

        protected void appendXmlHeader(java.lang.String encoding,
                               java.lang.StringBuffer sb)
        Adds an XML header to the given StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        encoding - The encoding to use.
        sb - The StringBuffer to write to.

        protected void appendNewLine(java.lang.StringBuffer sb)
